clusters.justification: These terms map onto underlying limbic and salience network architectures responsible for processing emotional valence, somatic arousal, and homeostatic reactivity to stimuli.
These terms converge on cortico-striatal circuits that compute incentive salience, process reward reinforcement, and guide motivation-driven decision making.

These terms represent a latent cognitive axis anchored in default mode network functioning, which mediates internally generated representations of the self, episodic memory, and the conceptual understanding of other agents.
